title: Lead Instructional Designer at Mumbai University

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Mumbai University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Mumbai University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Coimbatore-based team.

About Mumbai University:
Mumbai University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mumbai University!
